Metadata.title: Ayoub Aalaou — Portfolio
Metadata.description: Portfolio and résumé of Ayoub Aalaou.

HomePage.bioP1: I'm confident working with HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, Sass, and JavaScript, as well as frameworks like Angular, React, Next.js, and jQuery. On the backend, I bring experience with PHP, C#, and MySQL. Clean code and testing — using tools like Playwright, Cypress, and Mocha — are a natural part of how I work to deliver stable results.
HomePage.bioP2: As a web developer with experience across frontend and backend, I focus on object-oriented development, performant web applications, and user-friendly interfaces. I'm open to new opportunities and excited to bring my skills to a motivated team.

ResumeInfo.aboutBody:
I'm confident working with HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, Sass, and JavaScript, as well as frameworks like Angular, React, Next.js, and jQuery. On the backend, I bring experience with PHP, C#, and MySQL. Clean code and testing — using tools like Playwright, Cypress, and Mocha — are a natural part of how I work to deliver stable results.

As a web developer with experience across frontend and backend, I focus on object-oriented development, performant web applications, and user-friendly interfaces. I'm open to new opportunities and excited to bring my skills to a motivated team.
